name: Brownie
title: The Brownie - Responsive HTML5 Template
description: Vertically-stacked single-page business template with a distinctive brown/gold color scheme and textured background. Features a top navigation bar with horizontal menu (Home, About, Services, Products, Contact) and a large site name in brown and gold. Each section uses a 2-column layout with alternating content placement: left column has either a dark-background image container with hover overlay or a brown-rectangle-framed carousel, while the right column has text content. The Home section shows a bicycle image with search icon overlay. About section features a jCarousel team member slider with circular framed photos, gold names, and decorative underline images. Services section displays 3 plan items with icons and descriptions in a brown-framed panel. Products section has another jCarousel showing product images. Contact section has a dark-background contact form with name, email, subject, message fields and social media icon links. Uses CSS Flexbox for vertical centering.

typography.style: Clean Open Sans with uppercase section titles and warm brown/gold color hierarchy

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid with CSS Flexbox centering. 2-column layout (col-lg-6) for each section. Alternating dark/light column backgrounds. Textured body background image.
visualStyle: Warm, elegant business aesthetic with brown and gold tones. Textured background, dark panels with brown rectangle frames, circular team photos with decorative borders.

name: Dragonfruit
title: Dragonfruit Template
description: Single-page scrolling business template with fixed top navigation bar on light gray (#f9f9f9) background with red (#f15556) bottom border. Logo area with image and two-tone text (red 'dragon' + green 'fruit'). Navigation with 6 links that slide to red background on hover. Hero banner with 3-slide image carousel (Unslider), each slide with centered white text caption and description with text-shadow. About section on white background with 4 circular colored icon containers in a row (rocket on red #bd3e25, cubes on teal #334d5c, bar-chart on gold #efc84a, comments on teal #334d5c), each with title and description. Below icons, a testimonial carousel with member photos, names, titles, and descriptions with prev/next navigation arrows. Events section on gray background shows 4 event cards in a 2-column grid, each with image, event title, location/time with glyphicons, and description. Timeline section displays 6 blog-style entries with date captions, titles, author/category/comment metadata with glyphicons, and content paragraphs. Contact section with Google Map, contact info with social icons (LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook, YouTube, GitHub), and a contact form with name/email/subject/message fields and send/reset buttons. Simple footer with copyright.

typography.style: Century Gothic sans-serif throughout, clean and geometric feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 fluid grid, max-width 1600px. Fixed top navigation 94px height. Banner 500px height with Unslider. About icons use col-md-3. Events use col-md-6. Timeline uses custom time_line_wap layout. Contact map full-width with form below.
visualStyle: Colorful, content-rich business template with multi-colored circular icons, event cards, and timeline entries. Red accent with geometric Century Gothic typography. Gray backgrounds with white content sections.

name: Tamarillo
title: Tamarillo HTML5 Template
description: Content-rich multi-page template with a FlexSlider banner carousel showing 4 slides with overlay captions and CTA buttons. About section features 3 rows of image-text pairs with Read More buttons. Services section displays 6 service items in a 2x3 grid with thumbnail images and descriptions. Blog section shows posts with images, metadata (tags, author, date, likes), and excerpts. Gallery section uses a responsive lightbox grid of 9 images. Contact section includes a form and Google Map embed. Horizontal divider lines between major sections. Footer with social icons.

typography.style: Standard system fonts with clean readability and dark red accent links

layoutDetails: Multi-page layout with Bootstrap 3 using 24-column grid variant. Full-width slider at top. Content sections use image-text pairs. Services in 2x3 grid. Gallery in 3-column lightbox grid.
visualStyle: Classic, content-rich business style. Dark red/maroon accent color. White background with horizontal divider lines. Image-heavy with thumbnails. Traditional web layout.
